channel.title: Confidently Wrong
channel.description: Chad, an overconfident tech bro, and Marina, a melodramatic conspiracy theorist, debate topics they absolutely do not understand. Every episode is polished, committed, and deeply, gloriously incorrect.
channel.itunes:author: Chad & Marina
channel.itunes:summary: Chad, an overconfident tech bro, and Marina, a melodramatic conspiracy theorist, debate topics they absolutely do not understand. Every episode is polished, committed, and deeply, gloriously incorrect.
channel.itunes:subtitle: The podcast where absolute confidence meets catastrophic accuracy.

item.title: Ep. 5: Pillow Talk: The Soft Underbelly of a Global Conspiracy
item.description: Chad and Marina expose the pillow industry and immediately disagree about everything except the documents inside the fill. Chad pitches PillowDAO while Marina traces cervical compression back to a shadowy dairy council. Feathers are never innocent.
item.itunes:title: Ep. 5: Pillow Talk: The Soft Underbelly of a Global Conspiracy
item.itunes:author: Chad & Marina
item.itunes:summary: Chad and Marina expose the pillow industry and immediately disagree about everything except the documents inside the fill. Chad pitches PillowDAO while Marina traces cervical compression back to a shadowy dairy council. Feathers are never innocent.
